appDesc: Choose a simulation from below and get started

tour.title: Welcome!
tour.body: Welcome to the 10 Minute School Mechanics Series. You can choose your preferred simulation mode from here.

tour.title: Junior Mode
tour.body: Here you will find simple and fun labs related to force, motion, and friction.

tour.title: Senior Mode
tour.body: Here you can perform detailed simulations and mathematical analysis of projectile motion.

intro.title: Physics Simulator
intro.description: The most fun way to learn the core concepts of physics through two interactive simulations: Force, Motion, and Projectile Motion.
outcomes: Directly test the core principles of force and motion
Visually apply the formulas of projectile motion
Analyze physics through graphs, formulas, and numbers
Become proficient in solving board-level physics problems
